message:
http(h1): robust framing + trailers + TE/CL hardening (bd-1hiy)

Key changes
- Add `trailers` to HTTP/1 Request/Response and Response::with_trailer()
- Implement incremental chunked decoder supporting chunk extensions + trailer-part
- Harden parsing: validate header names; reject duplicate Content-Length / Transfer-Encoding; reject unsupported TE tokens; reject TE on HTTP/1.0
- Harden encoding: validate header fields; enforce Content-Length matches body; support chunked trailers; reject trailers without TE: chunked
- Client: support EOF-delimited bodies when no length is present; treat 1xx/204/304 as no-body

Tests
- Add unit tests for chunk extensions, trailers, duplicate CL/TE, unsupported TE tokens, and EOF-delimited responses
